comments.summary: Word-count inconsistency: main.tex declares 2,310 body words; cover-letter.md declares 2,281. Re-run texcount once and propagate a single number to both files before submission.
references.bib retains verification-pending notes for lintom2026 and linehs2024; operator-step at submission release.

JOURNAL.md Generative-AI disclosure section now embeds an interpretive sentence about bilateral lifting; ensure this working-interpretation prose does not bleed into Editorial Manager submission metadata.

new_comments.summary: Hyphenation/tilde harmonisation across manuscript, cover letter and disclosure documents (Layer~1 vs Layer 1; AI-vs-operator). Editorial copy-edit pass before submission.

Section 4 paragraph 2 mentions 'a clinical-genomics journal of its own choice' without naming the journal the Layer-1 pipeline selected. Replace with the actual journal name plus a citation to the case-study manuscript or its preprint.

docs/ai-usage-disclosure.md correctly lists an operator-in-the-loop gate at commit acceptance and tag push; Section 4 implies the only human step is Layer 3. Add one clause acknowledging the operator-gated release tag so the manuscript matches the disclosure document.

acceptance_conditions_for_round3: At release tag, the Layer-3 conditional sentence at manuscript/main.tex line 144 must be collapsed to the actual branch (positive or null) with the real Delta C value and bootstrap CI substituted for the placeholders hat-delta, L, U. This is the C3 close-out gate.
N1, N2, N3 addressed in a final copy-edit pass.

external_check.findings: Hematology & Medical Oncology Fellow at Koo Foundation Sun Yat-Sen Cancer Center since 2023-08. Board-certified Internal Medicine (TSIM) and Medical Oncology (Taiwan Oncology Society). Four-paper record: HFNO in cancer patients, G-CSF timing in CIN, HSCT in T-cell lymphoma, theory-of-mind in LLM poker agents. Manuscript wording 'haematology and medical oncology fellow whose published clinical work is in hematologic malignancies and supportive care' is calibrated to the CV.
